name: Lump Crab and Seaweed Salad with Fried Rice Noodles
recipeIngredient: 10 ounces fresh lump crab meat, shells removed, and cartilage removed
1 small mango, peeled and cut into 1/2-inch dice
salt and freshly ground black pepper
1 small bag of frozen dark green seaweed, thawed, available in nutrition stores or specialty Asian stores
1 tablespoon soy sauce or to taste
1 tablespoon sesame oil or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the crab meat, mango, chives, salt, pepper, and mirin. Toss to combine.
2. Taste and adjust seasoning with additional mirin, salt, and/or pepper as needed.
3. In a second bowl, season the thawed seaweed with soy sauce and sesame oil to taste. Sprinkle the seaweed with toasted sesame seeds and toss to combine.
4. Heat 1- to 2 inches of peanut oil in a small deep pan to 360 degrees F. Fry the rice noodles until crispy and transfer them to paper towels to drain. Season with salt.
5. Arrange the seaweed on a plate. Place the crab meat on top and garnish with the crispy noodles.
Yield: 4 to 6 servings
